lore.summary: A wholly fictitious, non-canon tribute to the All-The-Vibes (ATV) community — an internal Microsoft community of AI enthusiasts (https://github.com/All-The-Vibes). Not part of the Honorverse; it lives in the dataset purely as an Easter egg, settled by tinkerers who shipped a personal starship from a weekend hackathon.
lore.fleet: StarterKit-class personal transports (ATV Phoenix, ATV TokenMasterX, ATV PaperBoard).
